description_long: This is a sleek, modern light jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The wings are straight with slight upward-angled winglets at the tips, and the engines are mounted above the wings on short pylons, giving it a distinctive appearance. The tail features a T-tail design with a horizontal stabilizer mounted atop a single vertical fin. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a series of windows, suggesting a multi-seat arrangement. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels visible. The exterior is finished in a combination of white, gray, and dark accents, giving it a polished, professional look.
description: A modern light jet airplane with a low-wing, T-tail design, above-wing engines, and a sleek, polished exterior in white and gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, low-mounted wings with upward winglets, and above-wing engine nacelles.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, cockpit placement, above-wing engines, and T-tail configuration.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the T-tail, twin engine nacelles above the wings, and the full span of the wings with winglets.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the cockpit, above-wing engines, and the aircraft's overall aerodynamic profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted above the wings on pylons.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer mounted at the top.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and multiple windows.
